notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Giants challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Matt Chapman reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Elly De La Cruz.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers grounds into a double play, second baseman Luis Arraez to shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers. Tyler Stephenson out at 2nd. Dane Myers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Eugenio Suárez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Eugenio Suárez grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Elly De La Cruz out at 2nd. Eugenio Suárez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Eugenio Suárez rally-killer GIDP

notableEvents.label: Matt Chapman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Matt Chapman grounds into a double play, shortstop Elly De La Cruz to second baseman Matt McLain to first baseman Sal Stewart. Luis Arraez out at 2nd. Matt Chapman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Susac pinch-hit
